var S0, S3, S5, S9, S12, S14, S15, S20, S23
ext S4, S8, S10, S11, S16, S17, S18, S19, S21, S22, S24;
J0: S12 -> S14; E0*(k0*S12 - k0r*S14);
J1: S14 + S9 -> S12; E1*(k1*S14*S9 - k1r*S12);
J2: S22 + S18 -> S15; E2*(k2*S22*S18 - k2r*S15);
J3: S5 -> S9 + S17; E3*(k3*S5 - k3r*S9*S17);
J4: S3 -> S8 + S0; E4*(k4*S3 - k4r*S8*S0);
J5: S19 -> S11 + S3; E5*(k5*S19 - k5r*S11*S3);
J6: S20 + S23 -> S9 + S4; E6*(k6*S20*S23 - k6r*S9*S4);
J7: S24 + S22 -> S16; E7*(k7*S24*S22 - k7r*S16);
J8: S21 -> S5; E8*(k8*S21 - k8r*S5);
J9: S15 + S18 -> S20; E9*(k9*S15*S18 - k9r*S20);
J10: S24 + S10 -> S0 + S11; E10*(k10*S24*S10 - k10r*S0*S11);
J11: S5 + S0 -> S23; E11*(k11*S5*S0 - k11r*S23);

k0 = 0.25540499970576014
k0r = 0.7347298879081595
k1 = 0.09913790153939273
